description:
2024 Range Rover Sport P400 Dynamic HSE, 3.0 TC V6, 4WD, 395bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 399,000 or AED 6,251 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 40,500 KM's - Full Service History - Land Rover Warranty Valid Until May 31st January 2029 or 150,000 KM's - Price includes VAT 
 - Santorini Black - Full PPF - Panoramic Sunroof - Ambient Lighting - Meridian Surround Sound System - Heated and Ventilated Seats - Lane Change Warning - Blind Spot Warning - Adaptive Cruise Control - Keyless Start - Keyless Entry - Surround View - Satellite Navigation - Apple Carplay - Electric Memory Seats - Power Folding Mirrors - Electric Tailgate - Bluetooth Connectivity
